elements.text: function canvasApp() { if (!canvasSupport ()) { return; function drawScreen () { context. fillStyle = "#EEEEEE'; context. fillRect(o, 0, theCanvas.width, theCanvas.height); context.strokeStyle = *#000000'; context.strokeRect(1, 1, theCanvas.width-2, theCanvas.height-2); ball.x += xunits; ball.y += yunits; context. fillStyle = "#000000"; context.beginPath(); context.arc(ball.x,ball.y,15,0,Math.PI*2,true); context.closePath(); context.fill(); if (ball.x › theCanvas.width || ball.x < 0 ) { angle = 180 - angle; updateBall); } else if (ball.y › theCanvas.height || ball.y ‹ 0) { angle = 360 - angle; updateBall); } } function updateBall() { radians = angle * Math.PI/ 180; xunits = Math.cos(radians) * speed; yunits = Math.sin (radians) * speed; var speed = 5; var p1 = {x:20, y:20}; var angle = 35; var radians = 0; var xunits = 0; var yunits = 0; var ball = {x:p1.x, y:p1.y}; updateBall(); theCanvas = document.getElementById("canvasOne"); context = theCanvas.getContext("2d"); setInterval(drawScreen, 33); }
